title: QUANTITATIVE SEPARATION OF CALCIUM FROM STRONTIUM USING ACETONE AS A SOLVENT
author: M. M. TILLU
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A quantitative separation of calcium from strontium has been effected by using acetone as a solvent. 'the method is based upon the principle that calcium nitrate is highly soluble in acetone while srantium nitrate is insoluble in the same solvent.
steps_raw: A quantitative separation of calcium from strontium has been effected by using acetone as a solvent. 'the method is based upon the principle that calcium nitrate is highly soluble in acetone while srantium nitrate is insoluble in the same solvent.
